name: service-reset
description: Oil service and inspection interval reset for Porsche Cayenne 958 — resets cluster module 0x17 via UDS over CAN from the PCM touchscreen, eliminating PIWIS/Durametric
author: dspl1236
screens: ServiceStatus.esd - Read current service interval data from cluster
ServiceReset.esd - Reset oil and inspection intervals via GEM buttons
scripts: service_install.sh - Deploy to PCM via copie_scr.sh
service_reset.sh - Execute UDS reset to cluster module 0x17
native: src/uds_send.c - SH4 cross-compiled binary for devctl() CAN access
